items.claim: Nurulo Aliev is an outstanding chain wrestler with good top control, excellent cardio, and good defensive discipline.
items.quote: Nulo, um, outstanding chain wrestler, uh, good top control, excellent cardio, and definitely discipline uh, defensively.

items.claim: Mike Davis has excellent boxing skills, good speed and power, dangerous kicks, and is very athletic.
items.quote: Mike Davis has excellent boxing skills, uh, pretty fast, pretty powerful, dangerous kicks, and definitely athletic.

items.claim: Magomed Tuchalov likes to strike, keeps the fight standing, and applies pressure to his opponents.
items.quote: he's going to just come in here and uh pretty much knock out Robero uh Brenson Riverio in this fight... a guy that pretty much ultimately likes to strike and um likes to keep the fight a stand and bang and puts pressure into his opponent.

items.claim: Magomed Tuchalov has an undefeated record of 6-0 and is considered very inexperienced.
items.quote: Mamed is only 6 and0 so very inexperienced.

items.claim: Brandon Ribeiro is an overall poor fighter in the UFC.
items.quote: we're banking on Roberio's, you know, being just overall trash fighter in uh in the UFC.
